title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
